creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text: Just an FYI.  I did a "make package" on pefs-kmod using a 14.1 file system (chrooted, the underlying system was 14.0), and installed the compiled package (in the 14.1 file system). I then booted into the 14.1 system and all is well; I have had no other issues with the upgrade.
